arguments.task: Visit official Shopify developer and first-party Shopify pages to verify: app description, API authentication methods, access/self-serve requirements, API surface types (REST/GraphQL), rate limits, and whether Shopify has an official MCP server or first-party MCP docs. Prefer pages on shopify.dev, help.shopify.com, shopify.dev/docs, github.com/shopify if official. Return the source URLs and concise extracted findings only.

input.thought: Start a browser research task on official Shopify sources.

raw_result.description: Commerce platform for building and operating online stores, apps, and retail workflows.
raw_result.auth_notes: Evidence gathered shows traditional app auth via OAuth for Shopify apps plus API credentials/access tokens, and separate agent/MCP-style bearer-token authentication on Shopify agent docs; exact full auth matrix for every Shopify surface was not exhaustively verified in the gathered evidence.
raw_result.gating_reason: Shopify developer documentation is publicly available on a self-serve basis via shopify.dev with app build and API docs accessible without contact-sales or partner approval evidenced in gathered pages.

api_surface.breadth: Broad platform APIs across app development and commerce workflows, with documented GraphQL rate-limit guidance and Shopify developer pages indicating multiple API surfaces; likely includes both GraphQL and REST, but breadth specifics were only partially verified from gathered evidence.
api_surface.mcp_notes: Gathered evidence includes official Shopify docs for agents/authentication indicating official MCP/agent support and a Shopify AI toolkit/UCP-related surface.

raw_result.rate_limit_notes: Official Shopify docs include a rate-limits page; gathered evidence specifically points to documented API usage/rate limits and suggests GraphQL cost-based limits, but the exact numeric limits were not captured from the current evidence set.
raw_result.notable_signals: Official first-party developer portal; dedicated rate-limit documentation; official agents/authentication docs indicating MCP-style support; app-building docs are publicly accessible.
raw_result.human_review_reason: Some fields remain only partially verified from the already gathered evidence: exact one-line API auth matrix across all Shopify surfaces, definitive REST+GraphQL confirmation from a specific cited page, and exact rate-limit numbers. Marked conservative conclusions accordingly.
